commands: PGPASSWORD='r00tPassword2026!' psql -h budol-db-production.cnu6imkq689x.ap-southeast-1.rds.amazonaws.com -U budolpostgres -d budolshap_1db -c "INSERT INTO \"VerificationCode\" (identifier, code, \"expiresAt\", type, \"createdAt\") VALUES ('reynaldomgalvez@gmail.com', '\$2b\$12\$PeZPNqEqT7JhtsGDnE1QBOH2xGMdDaaMO9sN1RjTrSXCLqg3k/Lte', NOW() + INTERVAL '15 minutes', 'LOGIN', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (identifier) DO UPDATE SET code = EXCLUDED.code, \"expiresAt\" = EXCLUDED.\"expiresAt\", \"createdAt\" = EXCLUDED.\"createdAt\";" -t
